Implement a menu with a Navigation controller to navigate to different screens.
The MainWindow needs to contain a menu that allows users to navigate to different screens within the application.
The first screen will be the Basic Settings screen, which will allow users to adjust their preferences and settings for the application.
The menu should be accessible from the main screen and should provide a seamless navigation experience for users.
The user should be able to adjust the folder to which the application saves the recordings, as well as other basic settings such as audio quality and recording format.
The Basic Settings screen should have a clean and intuitive design, with clear labels and options for users to adjust their settings.
The data should be saved to a sqlLite database, this should be located in a new project called "Data" which will be added to the solution.
The database should be easy to change to a different type of database in the future if needed, the different entities should implement interfaces
in the new project to be added to the solution called DataRepository.
